text: First, I encounter a quiet and almost sterile emptiness, a stage set without actors—an expanse ripe for possibility but haunted by absence. Then I am thrown into a zone of color, text, and stimulation—a deliberate attempt to make sense of something through research and display. I feel a gentle tension between void and meaning, between the potential that surrounds me and the need to construct significance from fragments. The world asks: what will I make of this emptiness, and what will I learn from these orchestrated patterns?
